hero_subtitle: Access all your student services in one unified platform
section_official_subtitle: Core services built and maintained by the KStack team
service_kauindex_desc: Find courses and sections with advanced filtering for a powerful searching experience
service_kauplanner_desc: Plan your semester with visual conflict detection
service_kaugroups_desc: Find Whatsapp groups based on your own schedule with ease
service_kaudevs_desc: Learn how to build on the stack, access documentation, and learn for free
service_kausubjects_desc: Explore subjects, rate, and review them with the community
section_powered_subtitle: Student projects sponsored and supported by our infrastructure
project_schedly_desc: Generate all possible class schedules and pick the best one, using the raw power of algorithms.
project_gpa_desc: Calculate your GPA and FCIT acceptance grades.
project_yours_desc: The stack is incomplete without you. Build the next essential tool and claim this spot.
cta_build_subtitle: Get your project featured here with free hosting, infrastructure, and tech support
section_solution_subtitle: Open source by design. Student-first by mission. The infrastructure KAU Students deserve.
feature_opensource_desc: KStack is built in the open, we have nothing to hide, and everything to show, every line of code is readable, auditable, and improvable.
feature_free_desc: Education support shouldn't have a paywall. All services are free, forever.
feature_sync_desc: Schedules, preferences, and data flow seamlessly across the entire KStack ecosystem in real time. Update once, reflect everywhere.
feature_community_desc: This isn't a corporate project, It's built by your peers who face the same challenges you do every day.
sso_subtitle: One account. One password. Instant access to every service in the ecosystem.
section_dev_subtitle: We provide world-class infrastructure, hosting, technical support, and visibility for ambitious student projects.
dev_hosting_desc: Spin up containers, host APIs, ship apps without the overhead, and pay absolutely nothing.
dev_auth_desc: Stop rebuilding login screens. Use our secure, pre-built student authentication and APIs to ship your features faster.
dev_skill_desc: Don't just code for grades. Ship production software, contribute to open source, and build a portfolio that gets you hired.
dev_audience_desc: Skip the marketing struggle. Stack your app on our ecosystem and reach thousands of students Immediately.
section_vision_subtitle: Our ecosystem is expanding. More services. More features. More possibilities.
footer_tagline: Built by students, for students at King Abdulaziz University
login_success_subtitle: Welcome to KStack. Your session is now active. You will be redirected shortly.
